headline: Enrique Lores has stepped down as President and CEO of HP Inc., with board member Bruce Broussard appointed as interim CEO alongside reaffirmed Q1 and FY26 guidance.
investor_impact: The sudden departure of CEO Enrique Lores introduces leadership uncertainty, though the appointment of experienced executive Bruce Broussard as interim CEO and the reaffirmation of FY26 guidance should help stabilize near-term sentiment. Investors will closely monitor the CEO search process and any potential strategic shifts under new permanent leadership.
key_figures: Board size reduced from 13 to 12 directors
